source_limitations: Years smoked and pack years are supported only as respiratory-history fields, not as a validated calculation workflow.
Generic respiratory-negative wording, examination fields, chest imaging, spirometry, generic clinician plan, fixed follow-up ranges, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Cancer-risk interpretation, investigation selection, cessation treatment choice, medicine dosing, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
